task_completion.description: Select the correct book reference in the Jurism library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The book reference titled 'Commentaries on the Laws of England' with the date '1803' is highlighted or selected in the central item list pane of the Jurism interface.

task_completion.description: Add William Blackstone to the creators list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand Info pane, 'Blackstone' and 'William' are entered into the last name and first name fields (or 'William Blackstone' in single-field mode) for the selected reference.

task_completion.description: Set William Blackstone's role to Author.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The clickable role label next to William Blackstone's name in the Info pane is set to 'Author'.

task_completion.description: Add St. George Tucker to the creators list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second creator row exists in the right-hand Info pane, and 'Tucker' and 'St. George' are entered into the last name and first name fields (or 'St. George Tucker' in single-field mode).

task_completion.description: Set St. George Tucker's role to Editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The clickable role label next to St. George Tucker's name in the Info pane is set to 'Editor'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Jurism graphical user interface to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Jurism application window with the Info pane being actively edited, rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent modified the existing reference rather than creating a new one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The central item list should not show duplicate entries for 'Commentaries on the Laws of England' (1803).

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not alter the title or year of the reference.
integrity.visual_evidence: In the Info pane, the Title field must still read 'Commentaries on the Laws of England' and the Date field must still read '1803'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Title: Commentaries on the Laws of England. Target Year: 1803. Creator 1: William Blackstone (Role: Author). Creator 2: St. George Tucker (Role: Editor).
